    CALL NOW
    ABOUT US

    We provide you with a relaxed and friendly office environment where you get adequate time to talk about your oral health concerns and receive professional & valuable help from the dental team for comprehensive dental treatment planning and attainment.

    Our Mission

    Providing Patient centred dental care in the neighbourhood with our gentle and caring dental team.

    OUR TEAM

    Our dental professionals are known for their gentle approach and compassionate care, making each patient feel comfortable and at ease throughout their visit.

    Dr. Iqbaljot Singh Dhunna

    Principle Dentist,

    BDS, DDS

    Dr. Iqbaljot Dhunna grew up in Calgary and began his dental journey in 2012 after earning a Bachelor's degree in Dental Surgery from India. After practicing dentistry in India for a year, he returned to Canada, drawn back by his love for his home and loved ones.

    ​

    In Toronto, he prepared for the National Dental Board exams and gained admission to the DDS program at the prestigious Schulich School of Dentistry at the University of Western Ontario. He graduated from UWO in June 2020. Throughout his education, he had the opportunity to work with dental missions in India, Jamaica, and outreach programs in London. He constantly seeks to expand his knowledge through Continuing Dental Education courses, which he applies to his daily practice. Since graduating, he has been serving communities in and around Calgary, including Castor and Brooks.

    ​

    Dr. Dhunna is skilled in various general dental procedures such as fillings, crowns, bridges, root canal treatments, extractions, oral surgeries, and cosmetic dentistry. He specializes in helping patients with dental anxiety, gag reflex issues, and dental emergencies. His patients describe him as gentle, informative, and able to put them at ease during their visits. Dr. Dhunna also performs oral cancer screenings and refers patients as needed.

    ​

    Outside of dentistry, Dr. Dhunna cherishes quality time with his family. He enjoys gardening, hosting BBQs, and outdoor activities like cycling, hiking, and kayaking in the Rockies.

    Manpreet Kaur Dhunna

    Registered Dental Hygienist

    FAQ

    Questions from our clients

    Our dental clinic provides a wide range of services to address your oral health needs. These include routine dental check-ups, teeth cleaning, teeth whitening, composite fillings, GIC fillings, root canal treatments (RCTs), post and core procedures in conjunction with crowns, veneers, dental bridges for missing teeth replacement, extractions, wisdom teeth extractions, socket preservation/bone graft, frenectomies, alveoloplasty, immediate dentures, and partial dentures.


    Please note that if you need to make any changes to your scheduled appointment, we kindly ask that you inform us at least 48 hours in advance. Your appointment holds a special significance as it is dedicated to addressing your oral health care needs. We understand that unexpected circumstances may arise, and we appreciate your cooperation in providing us with sufficient notice for any adjustments required.

    We accept debit, mastercard, visa, cash, and cheques.

    Yes, we are pleased to offer direct billing services. We will handle the insurance assignments for you, making the payment process more convenient and streamlined.

    Absolutely! We accept all major insurance plans, including federal plans for children, as well as university and college student plans. We strive to accommodate a wide range of insurance providers to ensure that our patients receive the benefits they are entitled to.

    Booking an appointment with us is simple. You can either call our office at 403-289-4411 or send us a message through our website. When reaching out, please provide us with the best phone number to reach you and let us know your preferred time for the appointment. We will promptly call you back within the same or next business day to confirm your appointment.

    Yes, we warmly welcome new patients of all age groups. We take great pleasure in serving the diverse population of our office community and look forward to providing you with exceptional dental care.
